description_long: This is a low-top Adidas sneaker featuring a predominantly white synthetic leather upper with three black stripes on the lateral side, characteristic of the Adidas brand. The shoe has a rounded toe, white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and subtle perforations along the side for ventilation. The heel is reinforced and displays a vertical black stripe detail, while the Adidas logo is visible on both the tongue and the outer heel area. The midsole is white with a thin black line running along its edge, and the outsole appears flat, suitable for urban walking. The interior is padded for comfort, and the overall construction suggests durability and everyday wearability. The shoe is clean and shows no visible signs of wear, indicating it is in new condition.
description: A white Adidas sneaker with black stripes, white laces, and visible Adidas branding, designed for urban casual wear. The shoe is clean, well-constructed, and appears new.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel with a vertical black stripe and the Adidas logo on the side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the clean white upper, subtle perforations, and the absence of stripes on this side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, white laces, and Adidas logo on the tongue.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the three black Adidas stripes and the Adidas logo on the heel.
attribute_logo: Black 'adidas' text on the tongue and outer heel, three black stripes on the right side
